en.extract:
The Kai cicadabird (Edolisoma dispar) is a species of bird in the family Campephagidae.
It is endemic to Indonesia.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest.
It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''[[Kai Islands|Kai]] cicadabird''' ('''''Edolisoma dispar''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Campephagidae]].
It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Indonesia]].

Its natural [[habitat]] is [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]].
It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].

zh.extract:
凯岛鹃鵙（学名：Edolisoma dispar）是山椒鸟科Edolisoma属的一种，为印度尼西亚的特有种。其自然栖息地为亚热带或热带的湿润低地森林。该物种因栖息地破坏而受威胁。


参考文献
BirdLife International. Coracina dispar. The IUCN Red List of Threatened Species 2009.   [2010-10-20] （英语）.
